name: Spillemyndigheden (Danish Gambling Authority)
statistical_standard: ISO/IEC 17020 (inspection body framework; NIST SP 800-22 implicit)
approved_labs_note: Labs must apply for approval directly from Spillemyndigheden. There is no pre-published approved-lab list equivalent to MGA or UKGC. Contact the authority for the current approved lab register.
notes: Denmark does not publish a fixed numeric RTP floor. The framework is accreditation-driven — the lab's process must be ISO/IEC 17020 compliant and approved by Spillemyndigheden. Source: F-2024-0540-EN-01.pdf.
